description_long: This axe features a robust, double-bladed head with a geometric, angular design, primarily composed of dark metallic material with orange-brown accents. The blades are thick and symmetrical, each side forming a broad, almost wing-like profile with cut-out sections that add a modern, stylized touch. The central hub where the blades meet is reinforced and adorned with a diamond-shaped detail, suggesting both strength and decorative intent. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, capped at both ends with pointed, metallic tips and black, spiked collars for added grip and protection. The overall construction is heavy-duty, with a focus on durability and visual impact, making it suitable for display or use in demanding urban scenarios. No visible brand or manufacturer markings are present, and the finish is matte with a slightly rough texture.
description: A heavy, double-bladed axe with angular, geometric metal blades and a straight, reinforced handle featuring spiked collars and pointed tips. The design is modern and robust, with dark metallic and orange-brown accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full double-bladed head with geometric cut-outs and the central diamond detail, as well as the straight handle with spiked collars.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the axe, highlighting the thickness of the blades and the pointed tips at both ends of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the symmetrical blade design and handle features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the handle and blade edges.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely wood or composite, capped with pointed metal tips and black spiked collars for grip; no curvature, ergonomic but robust.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed, angular and geometric with cut-out sections, symmetrical, thick profile, no beard, with a central diamond-shaped hub and decorative accents.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern reinforced mounting with visible collars and central hub, likely bolted or integrated for strength.
